name: Page Cavanaugh
abstract: Walter Page Cavanaugh (January 26, 1922 in Cherokee, Kansas – December 19, 2008 in Los Angeles) was an American jazz and pop pianist, vocalist, and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: I would get out of the club and dash across that street and hope I wouldn't get killed to go and hear him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marian McPartland — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: We’re going to do a memorial with my big band, and Supersax and Page Cavanaugh.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
